Medal of Deep Thought  
 

Lore Item No Trade
Slot: NECK
AC: 10
WIS: +9 INT: +9 HP: +75 MANA: +30
SV FIRE: +4 SV DISEASE: +4 SV COLD: +4 SV MAGIC: +4 SV POISON: +4
WT: 0.0 Size: TINY
Class: CLR DRU SHM NEC WIZ MAG ENC
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)
Medal of Deep Thought
Lore Item No Trade
Slot: NECK
AC: 10
WIS: +9 INT: +9 HP: +75 MANA: +30
SV FIRE: +4 SV DISEASE: +4 SV COLD: +4 SV MAGIC: +4 SV POISON: +4
WT: 0.0 Size: TINY
Class: CLR DRU SHM NEC WIZ MAG ENC
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)

Item Type:Armor
Stackable:No
Lucy Entry By:Biny
Item Updated By:SwiftyMUSE
Source:Live
IC Last Updated:2021-10-18 04:24:29
Page Updated:Thu Oct 9th, 2008

Expansion: Scars of Velious
Rarity: Rare
Level to Attain: 55

It didn't get flowing thought (boo, hiss), but it did get +4 to all resists (yay).

Name

# Jun 20 2001 at 9:27 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591760459997
53 posts
With the name 'medal of deep thought' shouldnt it have a proc such as flowing thought. Stats are great but with a mana regen increaser this thing would be crazy.


Wendail Wolfbane
▲ Page top
My belief
QuoteReply
# Jun 21 2001 at 7:10 AM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1591749885264
Guru
248 posts
Is that north wing of ToV was itemized before Flowing Thought was implemented, which explains the lack of it. A lot of us are hoping the north wing stuff gets majorly upgraded, as it is pretty underpowered for the difficulty of the area (and you wouldn't really take the time to do it rather than sleeper's, the gods, faction bosses, etc).
▲ Page top
This thingy...
QuoteReply
# Jun 20 2001 at 9:49 AM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1591749811190
Sage
295 posts
Drops off Lady Nevedaria. The folks there were pretty disappointed with it, really - the lack of resists on the necklace turned most folks off. However, I thought it was underrated because of the high +hp on it - 75 is really high for a necklace, and ac10 isn't bad either. Personally, I'm hoping it will be upgraded - I still don't have any items with flowing thought, and if anything deserves to have it attached to an item, this does. :)
▲ Page top
Once again
QuoteReply
